title: US Ultimatum to Iran has 24 hours left - Trump angry at Japan and France negotiating separately with Iran
snippet: The US Ultimatum for Iran to accept its demands has 24 hour left. Japan, France are the newest given permission to pass. Trump is said to be Angry that these Countries Negotiated a separate deal with Iran.

title: Iran launched overnight drone/missile strikes on Kuwait, UAE, Bahrain targeting energy infrastructure
snippet: Iran launched overnight drone/missile strikes on Kuwait, UAE, and Bahrain, targeting energy infrastructure. Kuwait: Oil Ministry building, power plants, desalination sites, oil facilities hit. UAE: gas/energy sites targeted with fires and casualties.

title: Trump deadline on Strait of Hormuz expires Monday - Two US aircraft downed in 48 hours, Iran rejects all ceasefire frameworks
snippet: Trump's deadline on the Strait of Hormuz expires Monday. Two downed U.S. aircraft over Iran in 48 hours, Kuwait's state oil headquarters still burning, Iran rejecting every ceasefire framework. Strait carries 20% of global oil supply.

title: Prediction markets: US x Iran ceasefire by April 30 = 18 cents, by May 31 = 34 cents - Jet fuel costs skyrocket
snippet: Prediction markets are moving: US x Iran ceasefire by April 30? 18¢. US x Iran ceasefire by May 31? 34¢. Jet fuel costs skyrocket amid Iran war.

title: Iran FM tells Pakistan: Tehran determined to defend itself using all capabilities - Gulf conflict enters sixth week
snippet: Iran FM tells Pakistan that Tehran is determined to defend itself using all capabilities, as the Gulf conflict enters its sixth week with no ceasefire in sight.

title: Oman and Iran meet to discuss Strait of Hormuz transit - Ceasefire odds drop to 1%
snippet: Oman and Iran meet to discuss transit through Strait of Hormuz amid ceasefire doubts. Ceasefire odds drop to 1%.

title: China condemns US/Israeli strikes on Iran, calls civilian protection 'red line', supports Iran's sovereignty
snippet: China has condemned US/Israeli strikes on Iran, called civilian protection a 'red line,' urged an immediate ceasefire, and said it supports Iran's sovereignty and right to defend itself. No military commitment.

title: BREAKING: Trump announces second F-15E pilot shot down on Friday has been rescued from Iran
snippet: President Trump announces that the second F-15E pilot who was shot down on Friday has been rescued from Iran.

title: BREAKING: Second F-15E crew member rescued after heavy firefight - must still exfiltrate from Iran
snippet: The second crew member from the downed F-15E has been rescued after a heavy firefight. Missing crew member confirmed rescued but not safe yet as they must still exfiltrate from Iran.

title: JCPOA history: Trump tore up Iran nuclear deal in previous term - Iran still complied with IAEA rules
snippet: Iran and US already had nuclear deal that was torn up by Trump in his last time in white house and it had verification methods built in. They got screwed once already when they were holding their end, i don't really think they'd trust US again that easy.

title: Iran gives Trump excuse to massively escalate - deadline for deal in first hour after futures open tomorrow
snippet: Iran targeted neighbour states' civilian infrastructure. Gives Trump an excuse to massively escalate tomorrow in the timeframe he gave them to make a deal (first hour after futures open tomorrow).

title: US begging Iran for 48hr ceasefire - Pete Hegseth accused
snippet: You are currently begging Iran for a 48hr ceasefire - mockery of Pete Hegseth and US posture.
